title: Photo Story: CJI Surya Kant leads Women's Day Walkathon in Chandigarh
description: A Women's Day walkathon was held in Chandigarh on Sunday morning as part of the ongoing India International Disputes Week (IIDW) 2026.The walkathon was flagged off by Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant from Sukhna Lake to the Open Hand Monument in the Capitol Complex, which also houses the Punjab and Haryana High Court.Various woman lawyers, students and men participated in the walk of about 2.5 to 3 kilometers.
